series_metadata.series_title: Incomplete initial applications for licenses, certificates of registration or limited permits
series_metadata.series_description: Record series includes original applications, supporting documents, copies of certificates of completion, correspondence, transcripts, or other documents filed by persons or entities in association with an initial application, but abandoned as incomplete following notification pursuant to OAC 4761:1-5-03, 4761:1-6-04, and 4761-5-04.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain for one year following final notice of abandonment. ; Electronic: Retain for one year following final notice of abandonment., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
